title: computesdk/computesdk
description: A free and open-source toolkit for running other people's code in your applications.
description_zh: 一个免费的开源工具包，用于在您的应用程序中运行其他人的代码。
summary: Selected from GitHub trending/topic candidates in the latest 24h window, ranked by stars after quality filtering.
